name: Democrats.org
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: No Supreme Court confirmation during Trump's campaign
body:
Trump is back on the campaign trail.
---
**Trump held his first re-election campaign rally yesterday. Tell Senate Republicans to play by their own rules and refuse to confirm his Supreme Court nominee during the campaign.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Supreme-Court-Confirmation1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170219_ew_nd&source=em_20170219_ew_nd")**
Let's take a stroll down memory lane.

Remember Merrick Garland -- President Obama's Supreme Court nominee who Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans stridently refused to confirm because of a totally fabricated notion that the Senate shouldn't confirm Supreme Court nominees during a presidential campaign?

Well, earlier this month Donald Trump picked Neil Gorsuch -- an ultra-conservative, anti-consumer, pro-business judge -- as his nominee to fill Merrick Garland's stolen Supreme Court seat. But yesterday, only 29 days into his presidency, Donald Trump held his first campaign rally for his 2020 re-election bid.

So, according to Mitch McConnell's standards, the Senate cannot and should not confirm Gorsuch to the Supreme Court because we are officially in campaign season.

Neil Gorsuch's nomination should be treated with the same respect that Republicans gave Merrick Garland -- it's only fair that Mitch McConnell play by his own rules.

**Add your name: demand that no nominee be confirmed to the Supreme Court during Trump's re-election campaign:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Supreme-Court-Confirmation1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170219_ew_nd&source=em_20170219_ew_nd")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c529/4067b0a/2ca16ad1c/7e7d6503/2133956922/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170219_ew_nd&source=em_20170219_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c529/4067b0a/2ca16ad1c/7e7d6500/2133956922/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170219_ew_nd&source=em_20170219_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c529/4067b0a/2ca16ad1c/7e7d6501/2133956922/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170219_ew_nd&source=em_20170219_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c529/4067b0a/2ca16ad1c/7e7d650e/2133956922/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170219_ew_nd&source=em_20170219_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: survey@maggiehassan.com
subject: Thoughts on where things stand?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd00/2a380d31/1406c4a9/fed19a/448280643/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd00/2a380d31/1406c4a9/fed19a/448280643/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello there,
Donald Trump was sworn in as President less than one month ago, and we'd like to get your thoughts on where the country stands.
With confirmation hearings underway, it's really important that we hear from you.**[Please, take our short survey now.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd00/2a380d31/1406c4a9/fed19b/448280643/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170219_state-of-the-country-survey-nd?source=e20170219_survey1_nd")**
So far, Trump has pushed an anti-American immigration ban, pledged to repeal the Affordable Care Act and defund Planned Parenthood, and come under fire for a potential national security risk involving his former National Security Advisor, Lt. General Michael Flynn and his ties to Russia and Vladimir Putin.
And that's just the tip of the iceberg.
Team -- you're a critical part of this community, and Senator Hassan really values your input.
[**Will you take our short survey about the direction our country is going?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd00/2a380d31/1406c4a9/fed19b/448280643/VEsC/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170219_state-of-the-country-survey-nd?source=e20170219_survey1_nd")
Thanks for sharing your thoughts!
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd00/2a380d31/1406c4a9/fed184/448280643/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzAyX2NvdW50cnktc3VydmV5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzAyMTlfc3VydmV5MV9uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_country-survey?refcode=e20170219_survey1_nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd00/2a380d31/1406c4a9/fed185/448280643/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
